target: 3. Welcome Back
July 24
( July 24 )
(This year, the summer festival at Higashimatsuri Shrine is being held…)

(This year, idol Kaori Koyuba is also coming,
and there are even more people than usual)

(According to Ushio and Mio,
it's almost miraculous that she came for this local event)

(What surprised me even more was,
she's actually from this island and one of our classmates)

(Ushio remembered clearly,
but I…)
Shinpei, over here! How much did you spend on shopping?!
Takoyaki was super long in line.

But I was surprised too,
who knew Kaori-chan would be an idol?
That's true…
But Shinpei, don't you remember Kaori-chan?
Oh, I do remember.
(Just barely…)

Hey, let's eat the takoyaki.
It'll get cold if we wait any longer.
Yay!
What is this?
Takoyaki, of course.
That's not it! I asked how much this is!
How much? You're going to eat all of it?

Whaaat!?
But you promised back then!
Promise?
You said you'd buy ten or a hundred!

…Huh?
When did we make that promise?
It should be coming back to me…
Oh! I get it now!
Remember when we got stuck in that narrow space?
Welcome back.
You're back!
KEY TIPS [route: Ushio] obtained.
